headline: Caterpillar Rallies 59% Amid AI Trade Boost, Offers Buy Point
summary: There is more to Caterpillar stock than the flashy yellow machines that are all too familiar at construction and mining sites.  Along with flexing its prowess in construction, the Dow component has become a data center play.  It also makes Caterpillar today's IBD 50 Stock To Watch.

headline: Car Sales Stink. Why GM and Ford Are Soaring.
summary: The legacy auto makers are wading into AI with battery storage sales. That’s what is driving their stocks right now—not new vehicles.
